Hi PM,

I had a great first week! I really enjoyed meeting the team and learning about the office. The coffee machine on the third floor is much better than the one on our floor — would recommend a walk up there mid-morning.

I noticed there is a yoga class on Wednesdays at 12:30 in the wellness room. I might check it out next week. Do you go to any of the in-office activities?

Also, the train from my side of town has been delayed three days running. I might switch to the bus.

See you Monday,
The new starter
